creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
My port x11/chameleon no longer compiles under 8.x, and so far hasn't
been easy to fix.  Additionally, the master site for this port went away years
ago, so it's safe to say that no new version will be released.  The
functionality provided by this port is also available in several other ports
now, so I think it's time to retire this one.

How-To-Repeat: 	N/A
